changeSet.author: asavin
changeSet.sql: alter table schedule.schedule_periods drop constraint ck_state; alter table schedule.schedule_periods add constraint ck_state check ( schedule_period_state in ('CREATED', 'PLANNED', 'STARTED'));

rollback.sql: alter table schedule.schedule_periods drop constraint ck_state; alter table schedule.schedule_periods add constraint ck_state check ( schedule_period_state in ('CREATED', 'STARTED'));
